query:
SELECT id, codigo, 
  CASE WHEN fotoAntesUrl IS NOT NULL AND fotoAntesUrl != '' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_fotoAntesUrl,
  CASE WHEN fotoAntesKey IS NOT NULL AND fotoAntesKey != '' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_fotoAntesKey,
  CASE WHEN fotoAntesBase64 IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(fotoAntesBase64) > 10 THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_fotoAntesBase64,
  CASE WHEN fotoDespuesUrl IS NOT NULL AND fotoDespuesUrl != '' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_fotoDespuesUrl,
  CASE WHEN fotoDespuesKey IS NOT NULL AND fotoDespuesKey != '' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_fotoDespuesKey,
  CASE WHEN fotoAntesMarcadaUrl IS NOT NULL AND fotoAntesMarcadaUrl != '' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_fotoAntesMarcadaUrl
FROM items 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3B47TRBhQthMPN1.da4a966d722d --database LjHhpq7m8HsaWSJ2BF6kdt --execute SELECT id, codigo, 
  CASE WHEN fotoAntesUrl IS NOT NULL AND fotoAntesUrl != '' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_fotoAntesUrl,
  CASE WHEN fotoAntesKey IS NOT NULL AND fotoAntesKey != '' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_fotoAntesKey,
  CASE WHEN fotoAntesBase64 IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(fotoAntesBase64) > 10 THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_fotoAntesBase64,
  CASE WHEN fotoDespuesUrl IS NOT NULL AND fotoDespuesUrl != '' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_fotoDespuesUrl,
  CASE WHEN fotoDespuesKey IS NOT NULL AND fotoDespuesKey != '' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_fotoDespuesKey,
  CASE WHEN fotoAntesMarcadaUrl IS NOT NULL AND fotoAntesMarcadaUrl != '' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END as has_fotoAntesMarcadaUrl
FROM items 
LIMIT 10;
